testcase.name: test_auth
testcase.error:
.venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_transports\default.py:101: in map_httpcore_exceptions yield .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_transports\default.py:394: in handle_async_request resp = await self._pool.handle_async_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_async\connection_pool.py:256: in handle_async_request raise exc from None .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_async\connection_pool.py:236: in handle_async_request response = await connection.handle_async_request( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_async\connection.py:101: in handle_async_request raise exc .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_async\connection.py:78: in handle_async_request stream = await self._connect(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_async\connection.py:124: in _connect stream = await self._network_backend.connect_tcp(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_backends\auto.py:31: in connect_tcp return await self._backend.connect_tcp( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_backends\anyio.py:113: in connect_tcp with map_exceptions(exc_map): C:\Program Files\Python312\Lib\contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpcore\_exceptions.py:14: in map_exceptions raise to_exc(exc) from exc E httpcore.ConnectTimeout
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: test_auth.py:29: in <module> asyncio.run(test_auth()) C:\Program Files\Python312\Lib\asyncio\runners.py:194: in run return runner.run(main) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python312\Lib\asyncio\runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\Python312\Lib\asyncio\base_events.py:685: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test_auth.py:10: in test_auth login_response = await client.post( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1859: in post return await self.request( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1540: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1629: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1657: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1694: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1730: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_transports\default.py:393: in handle_async_request with map_httpcore_exceptions(): C:\Program Files\Python312\Lib\contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) .venv-1\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_transports\default.py:118: in map_httpcore_exceptions raise mapped_exc(message) from exc E httpx.ConnectTimeout

testcase.name: test
testcase.error: test.py:9: in <module> raise ValueError("GROQ_API_KEY not found in .env") E ValueError: GROQ_API_KEY not found in .env
